headline: 8 Malaysians Extradited From Cambodia Scam Centre
context: Malaysia extradited 8 nationals from Cambodia under new treaty targeting cross-border scam syndicates in February 2026.

cards.big: 8 Malaysians extradited from Cambodia under new anti-scam treaty
cards.sub: First use of 2025 extradition agreement to repatriate cybercrime suspects

cards.big: Suspects operated call centre in Sihanoukville defrauding 3,200 victims
cards.sub: Syndicate stole RM180 million through investment and romance scams

cards.big: Malaysia signed extradition treaties with 3 new countries in 2025
cards.sub: Cambodia Laos and Myanmar agreements specifically cover telecom fraud

cards.big: PDRM estimates 1,800 Malaysians currently in scam centres across region
cards.sub: Many initially recruited through fake job ads then held against their will

cards.big: Extradition treaties test whether cross-border legal cooperation can disrupt scam ecosystems
8 Malaysians rescued from Cambodia scam centres. Transnational fraud requires joint operations, not just arrests.
